name: academorix/localization
purpose: Multilingual substrate — PlatformLanguage, TenantLocale, Translation, TranslationJob aggregates plus a decorated Translator with 5 machine-translation drivers.
capabilities: PlatformLanguage — BCP-47 catalogue FK-linked to geography::Language
TenantLocale — per-tenant enabled locales with fallback + auto-translate
Translation — persistent DB cache of key -> value
TranslationJob — audit trail for async bulk translation
Decorated Translator so t() / __() consult DB cache first
Drivers: OpenAI, Google, DeepL, AWS Translate, Azure
#[Translatable] attribute for Eloquent property translation + RTL awareness
when_to_use: The app ships to multiple locales and needs per-tenant DB-cached translations plus machine-translation fallbacks.
when_not_to_use: For the reference ISO-639 + ISO-3166 catalogue only, use academorix/geography directly.
